name: panicdna-ax-monitor
description: AX usage measurement for Claude Code. A SessionEnd/Stop hook ships each session transcript to a measurement server (Summarizer → OpenAI-compatible summary) with zero workflow change, and a bundled stdlib local verifier lets you test the flow without a full backend. Bundles its own install/uninstall skills.

plugins.name: ax-monitor
plugins.description: Claude Code SessionEnd/Stop hook that POSTs the session transcript to an AX measurement server. Optional per-turn rows, call logging, and a bundled local verifier. Bundles the 'install-ax-monitor' and 'uninstall-ax-monitor' skills.
